content:
"Any sufficiently advanced technology is indistinguishable from magic." - Arthur C. Clarke

#TechQuotes #Programming

💡 Pro tip: Always write code as if the person maintaining it is a violent psychopath who knows where you live.

#CodingTips #DevHumor

When your code works on the first try:

"Wait, that's illegal" 🤔

#DevLife #Programming

🔥 Did you know? The first computer bug was an actual moth found in a Harvard Mark II computer in 1947.

#TechFacts #ComputerHistory

Remember: Code is read more often than it's written. Make it readable! 📖

#CleanCode #BestPractices

99 little bugs in the code
99 little bugs
Take one down, patch it around
127 little bugs in the code 🐛

#DevHumor #Debugging

"First, solve the problem. Then, write the code." - John Johnson

#Programming #SoftwareEngineering

🚀 Performance tip: Premature optimization is the root of all evil. Make it work, then make it fast.

#DevTips #Performance
